base.schema.json.title: GitHub CI Assembler Configuration
base.schema.json.description: Defines the pipeline skeleton: stage topology and schema version. Purely structural — workflow-level properties (name, on, defaults, env) are defined in packages and/or the project file.

version.description: Schema version. Currently only '1' is supported.

stages.description: Ordered list of stage names defining the pipeline topology.

package.schema.json.title: GitHub CI Assembler Package Configuration
package.schema.json.description: A package contributing jobs to pipeline stages and optionally defining workflow-level properties. Validates the orchestration layer (id, hooks, stages, job ids). Job definitions below the job id are native GitHub Actions passthrough and are not validated by this schema.

id.description: Unique package identifier. Used as the job id prefix and as the provided_by target in project.yml. Must be unique across all packages.

name.description: Workflow display name in GitHub Actions UI. Last definition across packages wins (scalar replacement).

on.description: Workflow triggers. Must use map form only (no scalar or list shorthand). Deep merged across packages in --pkg order.

defaults.description: Workflow-level defaults (e.g., defaults.run.shell). Deep merged across packages in --pkg order.

env.description: Workflow-level environment variables. Deep merged across packages in --pkg order.

hooks.description: Map of stage name → jobs. Stage names are validated against configuration.yml at assembly time.

^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$.description: Jobs for this stage. Keys are job ids, values are GitHub Actions job definitions (opaque).
GitHub Actions job definition. Passthrough — not validated by this schema.

project.schema.json.title: GitHub CI Assembler Project Configuration
project.schema.json.description: Per-project customizations. Can define workflow-level property overrides (name, on, defaults, env) and/or job operations (extend, replace, disable, new). Job properties are native GitHub Actions passthrough and are not validated by this schema.

name.description: Workflow display name override. Takes highest priority over package-defined names.

on.description: Workflow trigger overrides. Must use map form only. Deep merged on top of package-defined triggers with highest priority.

defaults.description: Workflow-level defaults overrides. Deep merged on top of package-defined defaults with highest priority.

env.description: Workflow-level environment variable overrides. Deep merged on top of package-defined env with highest priority.

^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$.description: Jobs for this stage. Each job is one of: new (no directive), extend, replace, or disable.

provided_by.description: The id of the package that provides the target job.

projectJob.description: A project job. Must be exactly one of: extend (has 'extend' key), replace (has 'replace' key), disable (has 'disable' key), or new (none of the above). Multiple directives on the same job are not allowed.

extendJob.description: Deep-merges project properties into an existing package job. Properties not declared here are preserved from the package.

replaceJob.description: Fully substitutes an existing package job. Nothing from the original survives.

disableJob.description: Removes a package-provided job from the pipeline.

newJob.description: A new job contributed by the project. Not prefixed in output.
